svg.title: Orifold takes the shorter path from scattered files to one finished PDF
svg.desc: A comparison between the usual PDF workflow of accounts, uploads, subscriptions, and app hopping, and Orifold's native, on-device, free, single-workspace flow. Animated file sheets fold through an origami crane into one polished PDF.

g.text: More waiting. More gates. More places for a file to be.
Local work moves at Mac speed.
Open it. Fold the whole job. Keep moving.
SHORTEST PATH FROM MESS TO DONE
